title: Cox Media fined after bragging it spied on users through their phones
summary: Cox Media, MindSift, and 1010 Digital Works were fined $930,000 by the FTC for falsely claiming they could spy on users through phones and smart devices for ad targeting. The companies had publicly boasted about their 'Voice Data' system in 2023 despite lacking evidence they could actually perform such surveillance.
content:
An exceptionally weird controversy has come back to haunt Cox Media and a pair of marketing firms, which claimed they were secretly listening to users via phones and smart devices - despite little evidence they actually could. On Thursday the Federal Trade Commission announced that Cox, MindSift, and 1010 Digital Works would pay a total of $930,000 to settle allegations that they were in fact lying about spying on people to target ads.
As chronicled by Techdirt a couple of years ago, Cox publicly boasted about a system called Voice Data back in 2023, telling potential digital marketing clients they could ensure "every casual conversation be …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Cox Media因虚假监视用户声称被罚款
zh.summary: Cox Media、MindSift和1010 Digital Works因虚假声称能够通过手机和智能设备监视用户以进行广告定向，被美国联邦贸易委员会罚款930,000美元。这些公司在2023年曾公开吹嘘他们的"语音数据"系统，尽管缺乏实际能够进行此类监视的证据。

title: What ClickUp’s mass layoff tells us about the future of work
summary: ClickUp, a nine-year-old startup, is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents, highlighting how AI automation is reshaping the future of work and corporate employment.
content: The nine-year-old startup is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents.

zh.title: ClickUp大规模裁员揭示工作未来的趋势
zh.summary: 成立九年的初创公司ClickUp正在用数千个AI代理替换数百名员工，突显出AI自动化正在如何重塑工作和企业就业的未来。

title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
summary: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to examine longstanding problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and technological elites shaping society. The document addresses these structural issues rather than focusing primarily on AI itself.
content: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.

zh.title: 教宗的人工智能通谕本质上并非关于人工智能
zh.summary: 教宗利奥十四世的首份通谕以人工智能为视角来审视根深蒂固的问题：权力集中、民主衰退和科技精英塑造社会。该文件针对这些结构性问题而非主要关注人工智能本身。

title: Pope Leo calls for being ‘profoundly human’ in the age of AI
summary: Pope Leo XIV released his first encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas,' warning of AI risks and unconstrained technological power while discussing AI-enabled warfare, labor disruption, and the urgent need for new legal and ethical frameworks to protect human dignity.
content:
Pope Leo XIV attends the presentation of his first Encyclical Letter "Magnifica humanitas" on May 25, 2026 in Vatican City, Vatican. | Getty Images	

Pope Leo XIV warned of the risks of AI and unconstrained technological power in his first major papal document released on Monday. Magnifica Humanitas is the pope's manifesto on "safeguarding the human person in the time of artificial intelligence," in which he discusses the dangers of AI-powered warfare, the effects of AI on labor, and the need for new legal and ethical frameworks to govern technology.
In his papal encyclical - a kind of open letter from the Catholic Church - Pope Leo stressed the economic and social upheaval that rapid AI adoption is creating, with inadequate protections for individuals that threaten human dignity. He com …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 教宗利奥呼吁在人工智能时代保持"深刻的人性"
zh.summary: 教宗利奥十四发布了他的第一份通谕《伟大的人性》，警告人工智能风险和不受限制的技术力量，同时讨论了人工智能驱动的战争、劳动力中断，以及建立新的法律和伦理框架以保护人类尊严的紧迫需要。

title: The pitch trick that helped an eSports startup raise $20M when VCs only wanted AI
summary: Lucra Sports founder Dylan Robbins raised $20M for his eSports startup despite a venture capital market saturated with AI-focused investments, using an innovative pitch strategy that distinguished his company from competitors.
content: Earlier this year, Lucra Sports founder and CEO Dylan Robbins did something that no one else has ever done. And he shared several secrets on how he did it.

zh.title: 帮助电竞创业公司在风投只想要AI时融资2000万的推介技巧
zh.summary: Lucra Sports创始人Dylan Robbins为他的电竞初创公司融资2000万美元，尽管风险投资市场被AI投资所饱和，但他使用了创新的推介策略，将他的公司与竞争对手区分开来。

title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in days: Apply before May 27
summary: The deadline to apply for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27, offering selected startups VC access, global media visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000 in funding.
content: The deadline to apply or nominate for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27. This is your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000. Apply now.

zh.title: 创业战场200应用程序即将关闭：在5月27日前申请
zh.summary: Startup Battlefield 200的申请截止日期为5月27日，为入选的初创公司提供风险投资渠道、全球媒体曝光、TechCrunch报道和10万美元的融资。

title: 5 days left: Save up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes before prices increase
summary: Early bird passes for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in San Francisco expire May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT, with discounts up to $410 available before standard pricing takes effect.
content: Early Bird savings for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in San Francisco end May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save up to $410 before prices increase.

zh.title: 还有5天：TechCrunch Disrupt 2026早鸟票最高优惠410美元，之后涨价
zh.summary: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026旧金山峰会的早鸟票优惠将于5月29日太平洋时间晚上11点59分截止，在标准价格实施前购票可享受最高410美元的折扣。

title: Here are our favorite last-minute deals from REI’s giant Anniversary Sale
summary: REI's annual Anniversary Sale ends May 25 with significant discounts on outdoor gear including camping equipment, hiking accessories, and smartwatches; members receive an additional 20% off one full-price item with code ANNIV26.
content:
REI’s annual Anniversary Sale — the retailer’s biggest of the year — is still going strong, letting you save on all kinds of outdoor essentials. If you’ve got a camping trip coming up, now is a good time to stock up on the basics, whether it be a tent, sleeping pad, or stove. If your summer plans involve hiking or heading into the backcountry, there are also savings to be had on everything from Garmin watches to water filters, some of which are also discounted at retailers like Amazon.
The sale runs through the end of today, May 25th, and to save you time scrolling, we’ve rounded up the best deals you can still grab below. Additionally, as in previous years, REI members get 20 percent off one full-price item or one REI Outlet item with code ANNIV26, giving those who pay for a lifetime membership ($30) even more ways to save through the end of Memorial Day.







Smartwatches and fitness trackers
Garmin Fenix 8
The Garmin Fenix 8 is a premium multisport watch that features a speaker, mic, and on-device assistant for calls, timers, and voice commands. It also offers elite battery life, dual-frequency GPS, and robust sensors. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $999.99 $749.99 at Amazon (43mm)
 $1099.99 $849.99 at Walmart (51mm)
 $1099.99 $849.99 at REI (47mm)


Amazfit Active 2
The Amazfit Active 2 delivers outsized value for the price. It looks spiffy and has a wide array of health tracking features, plus built-in GPS and AI chatbots to provide extra context to your data. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $99.99 $89.99 at Amazon
 $99.99 $89.99 at Best Buy
 $99.99 $84.99 at REI

Garmin’s Venu 4 is geared toward the average athlete, and it’s on sale at REI, Amazon, and Best Buy in both size configurations for $499.99 ($50 off), matching its best price to date. The wearable offers many of the same health and fitness tracking features as its predecessor, the Venu 3S, including abnormal heart rate alerts, detailed sleep insights, audio-guided meditation sessions, and a whe

zh.title: REI周年庆大促最后时刻精选好物
zh.summary: REI年度周年庆大促于5月25日结束，户外装备（包括露营用品、登山配件和智能手表）均有大幅折扣；会员使用ANNIV26代码可在全价商品上额外享受20%折扣。

title: US's big bet on quantum computing may not be entirely legal
summary: The US government's quantum computing initiatives may face legal challenges, raising concerns about regulatory compliance. The program launched the first quantum foundry company, though questions remain about whether such ventures address actual market demand.
content: Deal also launched the first quantum foundry company, but is there a need for it?

zh.title: 美国量子计算的重大投资可能并不完全合法
zh.summary: 美国政府的量子计算计划可能面临法律挑战，引发了对监管合规性的担忧。该计划推出了第一家量子铸造公司，但仍存在疑问，这样的企业风险是否能真正满足实际的市场需求。

title: I spent years forcing myself to finish The Witcher 3—don't repeat my mistake
summary: Gaming consensus and genre popularity are unreliable predictors of personal enjoyment. Rather than forcing yourself to finish games others praise, you should prioritize what actually resonates with you.
content: Consensus and genre labels aren't reliable predictors of what you'll enjoy.

zh.title: 我花了多年强迫自己完成《巫师3》——别重蹈我的覆辙
zh.summary: 游戏共识和流派的流行程度不是个人游戏享受的可靠指标。与其强迫自己完成他人推崇的游戏，不如优先选择真正引起你共鸣的内容。
